gates.command: python3 -c "import json; data=json.load(open('apps/server/seeds/topics.json')); assert isinstance(data, list), 'Not a list'; assert len(data)==50, f'Expected 50, got {len(data)}'; [assert all(k in t for k in ('text','category','difficulty')) for t in data]"

python3 -c "import json; data=json.load(open('apps/server/seeds/topics.json')); cats=set(t['category'] for t in data); required={'relationships','world','hypothetical','personal','creative'}; assert cats==required, f'Missing: {required-cats}, Extra: {cats-required}'"

python3 -c "import json; data=json.load(open('apps/server/seeds/topics.json')); diffs=set(t['difficulty'] for t in data); required={'easy','medium','hard'}; assert diffs==required, f'Missing: {required-diffs}, Extra: {diffs-required}'"

python3 -c "import json; data=json.load(open('apps/server/seeds/topics.json')); assert all(len(t['text'])>10 for t in data), 'All topics must be >10 chars'; assert all(t['text'].strip() for t in data), 'No empty topics'"
